allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\ljflorio\\OneDrive - Cencosud\\Escritorio\\LIF ENERGY\\lif-mkt-dashboard\\front-end"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse | Where-Object { -not $_.FullName.Contains\('\\node_modules\\'\) -and -not $_.FullName.Contains\('\\dist\\'\) -and -not $_.FullName.Contains\('\\.claude\\'\) -and -not $_.PSIsContainer } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\($PWD.Path + '\\', ''\) })
